name: Low-Temperature Pasteurization Treatment
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a canner halfway with warm water (120°F to 140°F).
2. Add hot water until it is at least 1 inch above the jars.
3. Heat the water so that the temperature reaches and maintains 180°F to 185°F for 30 minutes.
4. Verify the water temperature is at least 180°F using a candy or jelly thermometer throughout the process.
5. Do not exceed temperatures higher than 185°F, as this may cause pickles to become too soft.
6. Use only when the recipe specifies it.
Caution: USDA Agriculture Information Bulletin No. 539 (rev. 1994)
